title: 7.1.6 Pan-Africanism and the OAU
description: 30 questions covering Pan-Africanism, African unity movements, and the establishment of the OAU

questions.question: What is the core idea of Pan-Africanism?
options: Peoples of African descent have common interests
Only North Africans share common heritage
questions.correctAnswer: Peoples of African descent have common interests

questions.question: Where did Pan-Africanism originate?
Where and when was the 5th Pan-African Congress held?
At the 5th Pan-African Congress, which delegates dominated?
Who played a key role in the 5th Pan-African Congress?
Kwame Nkrumah formed the Union of Independent African States in 1958. Which two countries initially joined?
Which third country joined the Union of Independent African States in 1960?
The Casablanca Group favored what type of political union for Africa?
options: Strong political union (United States of Africa)
questions.correctAnswer: Strong political union (United States of Africa)

questions.question: Which countries were members of the Casablanca Group?
options: Ghana, Guinea, Egypt, Mali, Morocco, Libya, Algerian government-in-exile
questions.correctAnswer: Ghana, Guinea, Egypt, Mali, Morocco, Libya, Algerian government-in-exile

questions.question: The Casablanca Group was formed in which year?
The Monrovia Group favored what type of union?
Which countries were members of the Monrovia Group?
options: Former French colonies + Nigeria, Ethiopia, Liberia, Sierra Leone
questions.correctAnswer: Former French colonies + Nigeria, Ethiopia, Liberia, Sierra Leone

questions.question: The Brazzaville Group consisted of:
Which group did the Brazzaville Group join?
Which two countries remained neutral and helped bridge the gap between the Casablanca and Monrovia groups?
When was the OAU (Organization of African Unity) established?
Where was the OAU established?
How many countries founded the OAU?
What were the main objectives of the OAU?
options: Rid continent of colonization/apartheid, promote unity, cooperation, safeguard sovereignty
questions.correctAnswer: Rid continent of colonization/apartheid, promote unity, cooperation, safeguard sovereignty

questions.question: Which was the supreme organ of the OAU?
options: Assembly of Heads of State and Government
questions.correctAnswer: Assembly of Heads of State and Government

questions.question: How often did the Assembly of Heads of State and Government meet?
The Council of Ministers in the OAU met how often?
What was the main function of the OAU Council of Ministers?
options: Prepare the agenda for the Assembly
questions.correctAnswer: Prepare the agenda for the Assembly

questions.question: The General Secretariat of the OAU was headed by:
options: A Secretary-General appointed by the Assembly
questions.correctAnswer: A Secretary-General appointed by the Assembly

questions.question: Who was the key figure behind the Union of Independent African States?
The 5th Pan-African Congress was held in which city?
Which century did Pan-Africanism originate?
Which two countries played a neutral role in bridging the Casablanca and Monrovia groups?
